ddls:
CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "bugzilla_bug_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated Bugzilla bug if applicable */,
  "erratum_id" TEXT /* Reference to the erratum if applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the change (e.g., Editorial, Substantive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "affected_sections" TEXT /* Sections of the documentation that are affected by the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the change request was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the change request was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change request (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the change request (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the change request */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the change request was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_bugzilla_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bugzilla_bug_id") REFERENCES bugzilla_bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_erratum_id FOREIGN KEY ("erratum_id") REFERENCES errata ("erratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugzilla_bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or summary of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., Open, Closed, In Progress) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the bug was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bug */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errata" (
  "erratum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each erratum entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the erratum */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the erratum was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the erratum was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("erratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the change category (e.g., Editorial, Substantive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, documentation) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change request associated with the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES change_requests ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission belongs */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the member belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was added */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member details were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
